what.a: ORMS is an Arabic AI studio for generating images and videos from a text description, via multiple OpenRouter models in one simple interface.

tech.q: Do I need technical experience to use it?
tech.a: Not at all. Write your idea in your language, use the prompt assistant to improve the description automatically, then press generate.

types.q: What kinds of content can I create?
types.a: Realistic and artistic images, short videos, product ads, social media designs, and cinematic and 3D scenes.

reference.q: Can I use a reference image?
reference.a: Yes, you can upload a reference image to generate an image from an image (img2img) or to start a video from a first frame.

arabic.q: Does the platform fully support Arabic?
arabic.a: Yes, the interface is fully Arabic RTL, and you can write descriptions in Arabic or English.

footer.desc: An AI studio for generating images and video from a single idea, via multiple OpenRouter models in one Arabic interface.

finalCta.desc: Write the idea, choose the content type, and let ORMS turn it into a ready-to-use image or video.
